title: CrossPath
description: CrossPath is an HTML5 Puzzle Game. In this puzzle game, you should drag the diamonds to draw a line in available spaces on the puzzle board. Each diamond has a number, you can draw lines from that diamond as many times as the number is. There are some obstacles and you can’t drag the lines on them. The puzzle board gets harder when you pass the levels. If you draw the lines in the wrong way, you can undo your moves.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play This Game is mobile-friendly and can be played on both browsers and mobile
